defaultContent.title: Reveal the work as it comes into view

name: Foreground/Background Speed Split

defaultContent.title: Two columns, two speeds, one story
defaultContent.description: The image lags gently behind the copy as you scroll, creating a layered, editorial feel that keeps a simple two-column block from feeling static.

items.title: Considered pace

items.title: Editorial depth
items.text: Overlapping speeds mimic the feel of a well-set magazine spread.

items.title: Fully themeable
items.text: Every colour, font and radius follows your brand style guide.

defaultContent.title: Creative
defaultContent.subtitle: at every scale

name: Mouse + Scroll Tilt Layers

defaultContent.title: Depth that follows the cursor
defaultContent.description: Move your pointer and the layers tilt in space; scroll and they drift apart. Subtle 3D that rewards attention without getting in the way.

name: Masked Headline Reveal
description: Word-by-word masked headline reveal on enter with a clip-in media panel.

defaultContent.title: Words that arrive with intention and never all at once
defaultContent.description: Each word rises from a masked edge as the section enters, giving the headline a deliberate, editorial cadence instead of a flat fade.

name: Staggered Feature Grid
description: Feature cards reveal in a stagger, each masked and settling from a slight scale.
originality: Original design — not a copy of any referenced screenshot.

defaultContent.title: Everything arrives in a considered order
defaultContent.description: Cards enter one after another with a subtle mask and settle from a slight scale, so the grid feels composed rather than dumped onto the page.

items.title: Fast by default
items.text: Transform and opacity only, so every reveal stays smooth on any device.

items.title: Reduced-motion safe
items.text: Honours the visitor's OS preference and falls back to a clean fade.

items.title: Fully themeable
items.text: Colours, radius and type all follow your brand style guide.

items.title: Composable
items.text: Drop it anywhere — the grid adapts from one to three columns.

items.title: Accessible
items.text: Semantic markup and visible focus states, never motion for its own sake.

items.title: Production-ready
items.text: No layout shift, no jank, no dependencies beyond the essentials.

name: Editorial Scroll Gallery
description: Cinematic work index — large alternating media clip-reveal with subtle parallax and a mono metadata grid as each row scrolls in.
originality: Original design — not a copy of any referenced screenshot.

name: Selected Projects Index
description: Asymmetric two-column work index — variously-sized media staggered down the page, each captioned name + metric, revealing on scroll.
originality: Original design — not a copy of any referenced screenshot.

name: Multi-Speed Column Gallery
description: 3-column masonry where each column scrolls at its own parallax speed for layered depth. Reveals per tile; stacks on mobile.

defaultContent.title: Depth you feel as you scroll

name: Full-Bleed Chapter Scroll
description: Cinematic full-width chapters — each over-scanned image parallaxes behind a large overlaid title and running NN / NN index.
originality: Original design — not a copy of any referenced screenshot.

name: Diagonal Cascade Gallery
description: Projects step across the page in a zig-zag staircase, each a different size, sliding + clip-revealing with in-frame parallax.
originality: Original design — not a copy of any referenced screenshot.

name: Sticky Stacked Chapters
description: Full-bleed images pin to the top and stack; as the next chapter scrolls up, the covered image scales down and dims while its media parallaxes behind the title.
originality: Original design — not a copy of any referenced screenshot.

name: Testimonials Marquee
description: Columns of quote cards drift vertically at their own speed behind a soft top/bottom mask. Reduced-motion safe; stacks to one column on mobile.
originality: Original design — not a copy of any referenced screenshot.

defaultContent.title: Loved by teams of every size
defaultContent.description: See how teams ship client-ready work faster.

items.title: Briana Patton
items.text: It turned a messy discovery call into a structured brief and plan in minutes. Our first drafts land far closer to what the client actually wants.

items.title: Bilal Ahmed
items.text: We plan the whole project before touching design. Rework across client work dropped massively.

items.title: Saman Malik
items.text: It gives my tools real context instead of a blank prompt. It's the missing layer between brief and build.

items.title: Omar Raza
items.text: As a freelancer I look far bigger than I am. Clients get a polished summary and clear scope on day one.

items.title: Zainab Hussain
items.text: Reusable pieces mean every project starts most of the way done. Timelines shrank without cutting quality.

items.title: Aliza Khan
items.text: Brand tokens stay consistent everywhere, so handoff is clean and revisions are minimal.

items.title: Farhan Siddiqui
items.text: The planning step alone paid for itself. Stakeholders sign off before a single pixel is styled.

items.title: Sana Sheikh
items.text: Clean structured exports drop straight into our build pipeline. No more copy-pasting from docs.

items.title: Hassan Ali
items.text: Onboarding new clients used to take a week. Now it's a single focused session.
